Education.name: Samagra Shiksha Abhiyan
Education.description: Integrated scheme for school education covering pre-school to class 12.

Education.name: Mid-Day Meal Scheme (PM POSHAN)
Education.description: Provides free lunch to school children to improve nutrition and attendance.

Education.name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship (NMMS)
Education.description: Scholarship for economically weaker students to reduce dropouts at class 8.

Education.name: PM e-Vidya
Education.description: Digital learning initiative to provide online education resources.

Education.name: National Digital Library of India (NDLI)
Education.description: Provides access to millions of digital books and learning resources.

Education.name: National Scholarship Portal (NSP)
Education.description: Single-window platform for scholarships offered by central and state governments.

Education.name: Rashtriya Uchchatar Shiksha Abhiyan (RUSA)
Education.description: Improves access, equity, and quality in higher education institutions.

Education.name: National Programme on Technology Enhanced Learning (NPTEL)
Education.description: Provides free online courses and certification in engineering and sciences.

Education.name: SWAYAM
Education.description: Massive open online courses platform for free learning.

Education.name: Ishan Uday Scholarship (NER)
Education.description: Scholarship for students from North Eastern Region pursuing higher education.

Health.name: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY)
Health.description: Provides free health coverage up to ₹5 lakh per family per year.

Health.name: National Health Mission (NHM)
Health.description: Strengthens healthcare delivery across rural and urban areas.

Health.name: Pradhan Mantri Swasthya Suraksha Yojana (PMSSY)
Health.description: Establishes AIIMS-like institutions and upgrades government medical colleges.

Health.name: Janani Suraksha Yojana (JSY)
Health.description: Promotes institutional delivery among poor pregnant women.

Health.name: National AIDS Control Programme (NACP)
Health.description: Prevention and control of HIV/AIDS through awareness and treatment.

Health.name: Rashtriya Bal Swasthya Karyakram (RBSK)
Health.description: Early identification and treatment of children with health conditions.

Health.name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Cancer, Diabetes, Cardiovascular Diseases and Stroke (NPCDCS)
Health.description: Provides preventive, diagnostic, and treatment services for non-communicable diseases.

Health.name: Pradhan Mantri Ayushman Bharat Health Infrastructure Mission (PM-ABHIM)
Health.description: Strengthens public health infrastructure across India.

Health.name: National Mental Health Programme (NMHP)
Health.description: Provides community-based mental health services and awareness.

Health.name: National Vector Borne Disease Control Programme (NVBDCP)
Health.description: Prevention and control of malaria, dengue, chikungunya, and other vector-borne diseases.

Agriculture.name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN)
Agriculture.description: Provides income support of ₹6,000 per year to small and marginal farmers.

Agriculture.name: Soil Health Card Scheme
Agriculture.description: Issues soil health cards to farmers to improve productivity through balanced fertilizer use.

Agriculture.name: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchai Yojana (PMKSY)
Agriculture.description: Promotes efficient irrigation practices to ensure 'Har Khet Ko Pani'.

Agriculture.name: National Agriculture Market (e-NAM)
Agriculture.description: Provides an online trading platform for agricultural commodities.

Agriculture.name: Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana (RKVY)
Agriculture.description: Supports state-level projects to improve agricultural productivity and infrastructure.

Agriculture.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
Agriculture.description: Crop insurance scheme to protect farmers against yield losses due to natural calamities.

Agriculture.name: National Mission on Sustainable Agriculture (NMSA)
Agriculture.description: Promotes sustainable practices like soil conservation, water-use efficiency, and organic farming.

Agriculture.name: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana (PKVY)
Agriculture.description: Encourages organic farming through cluster-based approaches.

Agriculture.name: National Food Security Mission (NFSM)
Agriculture.description: Aims to increase production of rice, wheat, pulses, and coarse cereals sustainably.

Agriculture.name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Maan-Dhan Yojana (PM-KMY)
Agriculture.description: Provides pension benefits to small and marginal farmers after retirement.

Employment.name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
Employment.description: Provides skill training to youth to enhance employability and entrepreneurship.

Employment.name: Stand-Up India Scheme
Employment.description: Facilitates bank loans to SC/ST and women entrepreneurs for setting up enterprises.

Employment.name: Startup India
Employment.description: Promotes innovation and entrepreneurship through tax benefits and funding support.

Employment.name: National Career Service (NCS)
Employment.description: Provides employment services including job matching, career counseling, and skill training.

Employment.name: Prime Minister’s Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP)
Employment.description: Credit-linked subsidy program to generate self-employment opportunities through micro-enterprises.

Employment.name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana (DDU-GKY)
Employment.description: Skill development program for rural youth to enhance employability.

Employment.name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS)
Employment.description: Provides financial support to establishments to promote apprenticeship training.

Employment.name: Skill India Mission
Employment.description: Umbrella program to train over 40 crore people in different skills by 2022.

Employment.name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA)
Employment.description: Provides guaranteed 100 days of wage employment to rural households.

Employment.name: National Skill Development Mission
Employment.description: Coordinates skill development efforts across ministries and industries.

Social Welfare.name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
Social Welfare.description: Provides universal access to banking facilities with zero-balance accounts.

Social Welfare.name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (Urban)
Social Welfare.description: Provides affordable housing for urban poor through subsidies and loans.

Social Welfare.name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (Gramin)
Social Welfare.description: Provides pucca houses to rural households living in kutcha houses.

Social Welfare.name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
Social Welfare.description: Provides fixed pension to unorganized sector workers after retirement.

Social Welfare.name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY)
Social Welfare.description: Provides free LPG connections to women from below poverty line households.

Social Welfare.name: National Social Assistance Programme (NSAP)
Social Welfare.description: Provides financial assistance to elderly, widows, and disabled persons.

Social Welfare.name: Pradhan Mantri Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana (PMGKAY)
Social Welfare.description: Provides free food grains to poor families under the National Food Security Act.

Social Welfare.name: Pradhan Mantri Vaya Vandana Yojana (PMVVY)
Social Welfare.description: Provides pension benefits to senior citizens through LIC-managed scheme.

Social Welfare.name: National Family Benefit Scheme (NFBS)
Social Welfare.description: Provides lump sum assistance to families living below poverty line on the death of the breadwinner.

Social Welfare.name: Pradhan Mantri Shram Yogi Maan-Dhan (PM-SYM)
Social Welfare.description: Provides pension benefits to unorganized workers after retirement.

Infrastructure.name: Bharatmala Pariyojana
Infrastructure.description: National highway development program to improve road connectivity across India.

Infrastructure.name: Sagarmala Programme
Infrastructure.description: Port-led development initiative to modernize ports and promote coastal shipping.

Infrastructure.name: Smart Cities Mission
Infrastructure.description: Develops 100 smart cities with sustainable urban infrastructure and technology-driven governance.

Infrastructure.name: Atal Mission for Rejuvenation and Urban Transformation (AMRUT)
Infrastructure.description: Provides basic urban infrastructure like water supply, sewerage, and green spaces.

Infrastructure.name: Pradhan Mantri Gram Sadak Yojana (PMGSY)
Infrastructure.description: Provides all-weather road connectivity to unconnected rural habitations.

Infrastructure.name: Regional Connectivity Scheme - UDAN
Infrastructure.description: Enhances regional air connectivity by making air travel affordable.

Infrastructure.name: Metro Rail Projects
Infrastructure.description: Supports metro rail systems in major cities to improve urban transport.

Infrastructure.name: National Infrastructure Pipeline (NIP)
Infrastructure.description: Provides a roadmap for investment in infrastructure projects across sectors.

Infrastructure.name: Industrial Corridors Programme
Infrastructure.description: Develops industrial corridors to boost manufacturing and logistics infrastructure.

Infrastructure.name: Dedicated Freight Corridor Project
Infrastructure.description: Constructs freight-only railway corridors to improve goods transport efficiency.

Women & Child.name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao (BBBP)
Women & Child.description: Promotes gender equality and education for girl children.

Women & Child.name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY)
Women & Child.description: Provides financial assistance to pregnant and lactating women for wage loss compensation.

Women & Child.name: Integrated Child Development Services (ICDS)
Women & Child.description: Provides nutrition, health, and preschool education services to children under 6 years and mothers.

Women & Child.name: One Stop Centre Scheme
Women & Child.description: Provides integrated support services to women affected by violence.

Women & Child.name: Working Women Hostel Scheme
Women & Child.description: Provides safe and affordable accommodation for working women.

Women & Child.name: National Creche Scheme
Women & Child.description: Provides daycare facilities for children of working mothers.

Women & Child.name: Mahila Shakti Kendra (MSK)
Women & Child.description: Empowers rural women through community participation and skill development.

Women & Child.name: Ujjawala Scheme
Women & Child.description: Provides prevention, rescue, rehabilitation, and reintegration services for victims of trafficking.

Women & Child.name: Child Protection Services Scheme
Women & Child.description: Ensures care, protection, and rehabilitation of children in need.

Women & Child.name: National Nutrition Mission (POSHAN Abhiyaan)
Women & Child.description: Improves nutritional outcomes for children, pregnant women, and lactating mothers.

Science & IT.name: Digital India Programme
Science & IT.description: Transforms India into a digitally empowered society and knowledge economy.

Science & IT.name: National Supercomputing Mission (NSM)
Science & IT.description: Establishes a network of supercomputers for scientific research and innovation.

Science & IT.name: National Mission on Quantum Technologies and Applications (NM-QTA)
Science & IT.description: Promotes research and development in quantum computing and communication.

Tourism & Culture.name: Incredible India Tourism Campaign
Tourism & Culture.description: Promotes India as a global tourist destination through branding and marketing.

Tourism & Culture.name: PRASAD Scheme
Tourism & Culture.description: Pilgrimage Rejuvenation and Spiritual Augmentation Drive for developing pilgrimage sites.

Tourism & Culture.name: HRIDAY Scheme
Tourism & Culture.description: National Heritage City Development and Augmentation Yojana for preserving heritage cities.

Tourism & Culture.name: National Mission on Libraries (NML)
Tourism & Culture.description: Modernizes public libraries to provide digital access and resources.

Tourism & Culture.name: Ek Bharat Shreshtha Bharat (EBSB)
Tourism & Culture.description: Promotes cultural exchange and national integration among states and union territories.

Sports.name: Khelo India Programme
Sports.description: Promotes sports culture by identifying and nurturing young talent.

Sports.name: Fit India Movement
Sports.description: Encourages citizens to adopt healthy lifestyles and fitness practices.
